hints: Complemento: la reunión familiar con todos los parientes
hintDisplay: Sujeto: mi abuela / Verbo: celebrar (pasado reportado) / Complemento: la reunión familiar con todos los parientes / Tiempo: el año pasado
spanishSentence: Mi abuela me dijo que había celebrado la reunión familiar con todos los parientes el año pasado.
correctSentence: My grandmother told me that she had celebrated the family reunion with all the relatives last year.

hints: Verbo: prometer (reported speech con would backshift)

correctSentence: My aunt promised that she would support her siblings during the family reunion last year.

hintDisplay: Sujeto: mi abuela / Verbo: asistir / Complemento: la reunión familiar / Tiempo: el año pasado

correctSentence: My grandmother mentioned that she had not attended the family reunion last year.
